name: HWR_SKILLS_MENTOR_PRFL
description: This table stores skills mentorship profiles information

columns.Name: PROFILE_ID
columns.Comments: This is the person ID of the profile for which mentorship profile info is stored

columns.Name: CURRENT_ROLE
columns.Comments: This is current skill role for the profile

columns.Name: CAREER_PATH
columns.Comments: This is the journey details to current skill role

columns.Name: RECOMMENDATIONS
columns.Comments: This is the recommendations for mentees

columns.Name: MENTORSHIP_OPT_IN
columns.Comments: This is the flag to indicated if the person has opted in for mentorship

columns.Name: SMP_ATTR_1
columns.Comments: SMP_ATTR_1: This is an extra column in case if needed

columns.Name: SMP_ATTR_2
columns.Comments: SMP_ATTR_2: This is an extra column in case if needed

columns.Name: PHONE_NUMBER
columns.Comments: This column stores the phone number of the mentorship profile.

columns.Name: YEARS_OF_EXP
columns.Comments: This column stores the no. of years of experience of the mentorship profile.

columns.Name: OTHER_RELEVANT_EXP
columns.Comments: This column stores other relevant experience and activities of the mentorship profile.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
